response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive software development experience, particularly in full-stack and web technologies, but his background in embedded networking and security features for LAN-switch products is limited. While he demonstrates strong problem-solving skills and a broad technical toolkit, his lack of direct experience with C for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, and embedded security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) reduces his fit for this role. His language proficiency also does not meet the native-level Japanese requirement.
strengths: Diverse software development experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, desktop, and embedded).
Strong track record in full-stack development, including TypeScript, Node.js, and modern tooling (CI/CD, TDD).
Proven ability to research and implement new technologies, as seen in open-source projects and workshops.
concerns: Lacks direct experience with C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel modification, a core requirement.
No demonstrated expertise in embedded security features (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) or Layer-2/Layer-3 networking.
Does not meet the native-level Japanese language proficiency requirement.
